title: Salter 1150 BKDR Digital Kitchen Scales, Stylish Glass Design, Cooking Scale for Home/Kitchen, Measures Liquids & Fluids, Metric/Imperial, Add & Weigh Function, Red Easy Read Display, Black
features: Measure ingredients into your mixing bowl or straight onto the glass platform with this Digital Kitchen Scale from Salter.
Featuring an Aquatronic function, the scale measures liquids and fluids easily and accurately, from milk, water, wine, stock and more.
Add and weigh multiple ingredients into the same bowl for super quick food preparation, helping to save time on washing up afterwards.
The glass digital scale has an easy to read display and are able to switch between metric/imperial measures to suit your preferences.
Stylish and slim in design, the scale fits neatly into any cupboard or drawer for quick and easy storage and wiped clean once used.
description: From the brand Previous page Over 260 years of precision Founded in 1760 as a family business, Salter has been a reliable partner in the kitchen and household for over 260 years. As the UK's most popular weighing method, we have started as a scale brand and have now expanded our range to cookware, bakeware, kitchen electrical appliances and food preparation. Experts for everyday use Rely on the experts for everyday use From coffee makers to frying pans - whether cooking for family or entertaining friends - Salter offers you all the products you need for everyday use. Busy kitchens need salter.. We understand the pressures of everyday life and have therefore developed a wide range of different products in all major kitchen categories that allow you to have a homemade meal faster and easier every day. Rely on us - in the kitchen and beyond! Next page
